Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: A shocking witness and the results of a DNA test determine the future of Mafi and Athena's tumultuous relationship.
Video.title: Knighton vs. Carrillo

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after her 9-year-old son passed away, she became addicted to heroin but has been clean for 30 years; she is suing her former friend for repayment of a loan, while the ex-friend denies owing her for anything.
Video.title: Past Bonds and Present Debts

Video.summary: The plaintiff wants her friend to repay her for a loan; the defendant says she used the money for her daughter's prom, but the plaintiff and her friends broke out into a fight and destroyed the venue, so she has refused to repay her.
Video.title: Prom Night

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: Dwayne sues his niece and her husband for $2,570, claiming they damaged his apartment and owe rent. The defendants argue the apartment had lead paint, harmed their child, and they paid in full. They countersue for $3,000 in damages.
Video.title: Family Feuding Over Rental

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: Crystal sues her ex-friend Claudia for $800, claiming she used her cruise payment for another guest after Crystal canceled due to her son’s accident. Claudia countersues for $1,000, alleging harassment and car damage.
Video.title: Cruise Catastrophe

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez

Video.summary: Professional dominatrix Sasha brings her boyfriend, Perrance, to court in hope of spicing up their relationship.
Video.title: Bryer vs. Williams

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: Tempers flare when feuding families draw a line down the middle of Raven and Daniel's tumultuous three-year relationship.
Video.title: Briggs vs. Tate

Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: Marlene sues her ex, David, for $5,000, claiming he’s a deadbeat who never repaid her loans. David countersues for $5,000, alleging she stole from him. He claims she’s materialistic and only misses their mornings together.
Video.title: Bickering Over Bills

Video.summary: Peter Persaud sues his sister-in-law Sharon Chee for $824.59, claiming she owes him for household items he bought for her apartment. Sharon argues she already paid for some items, rejected the bed, and isn't liable for unwanted items.
Video.title: Suing a Sister-in-Law

Video.summary: Plaintiff Caitlin Crommett sues landlord Allan Arfa for $4,135, claiming her apartment was infested with bedbugs. Allan denies the infestation, alleging Caitlin fabricated the story to break her lease early. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Bed Bug Infestation

Video.summary: Plaintiff Eva Aleman sues Nicholas Satriano after his pit bull killed her Yorkie, alleging he reneged on promises to cover cremation costs and replace her dog. Nicholas claims her dog was loose and provoked the fight.
Video.title: Your Dog Killed My Dog!

Video.summary: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.
Video.title: Seeking Her Grandson

Video.summary: Jessica is suing her ex-boyfriend, stating he attacked her after accusing her of sleeping with his cousin.
Video.title: You're Just Toxic

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: Emanuel has brought his former friend to court over a collections bill.
Video.title: Gone to Collections

Video.summary: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him in their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.
Video.title: Fuming Over a Mobile Home

Video.summary: Sherri is suing her ex-husband for her son's unpaid medical bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Teaching a Life Lesson

Video.summary: Wilbur and his wife are suing his sister, Jennifer, after their son was left out of their grandmother's will.
Video.title: Will-fully Repugnant

Video.summary: Mindy Santez sues Roy Franklin for $2M over Timmy's ruined Olympic career due to Roy's drunken scooter incident at a July 4th festival. Mindy claims Roy's ongoing violations led to harassment. Roy cites alleged targeting, like cat removal.
Video.title: Rascal Roy & HOA Nightmare

Video.summary: Daniel sues Jeremy for $800,000, alleging copyright infringement over "Nightshade Ninja" costume copied as "Shadow Shogun." Jeremy denies, claims originality, forgives Daniel for reputation damage.
Video.title: The Hero-Con

Video.summary: The Wilsons sue Sean Moore, Ballpark Bandits sponsor, for $10,000. Their son got fired mid-season, Sean blames Kevin's erratic behavior and Laurie for fostering negativity and intimidating parents.
Video.title: Little League, Big Problems

Video.summary: Ariana Garcia, 19, is suing her parents for refusal to acknowledge and respect her privacy and boundaries.
Video.title: Baby Blues

Video.summary: Forty-six-year-old Jennifer Lozada is suing her husband and his mistress for alienation of affection.
Video.title: Alienated Whistleblower

Video.summary: Gabriella is suing her former employer for $600,000 for mental anguish and wrongful termination.
Video.title: Anniversary Blowout

Video.summary: Chris sues ex-wife Lisa for $10K, citing emotional distress and property damage. He says Lisa punctured his emotional support doll, "Dolly." Lisa denies it, blaming Chris's objectophilia and claiming Dolly deflated when he sat on it.
Video.title: Deflated Love

Video.summary: Erica Green is suing her ex-trainer Susan White for emotional distress and fraud, seeking $15,000. Erica reached her goal weight in 2019 but gained 30 pounds during Covid. She signed up for Susan's "Waist Away" program with a weight loss guarantee but gained 25 pounds. Susan blames Erica's non-commitment and countersues for defamation, seeking $25,000. Erica's current trainer, Mark, regrets taking her as a client, as she fired him and he witnessed her unhealthy eating habits.
Video.title: Waisting Away

Video.summary: Michelle is suing Michael and Nuri for negligence and business loss after her high-end spa was damaged.
Video.title: Piglet Parade

Video.summary: Alexa is suing her boyfriend for abruptly canceling a trip of a lifetime because she needed to bring her kid.
Video.title: Adults only

Video.summary: Giselle is suing her father for Emotional Distress and $145,000 for the cost of canceling her wedding.
Video.title: Daddy Dearest

Video.summary: Maddy sues Vanessa for theft and emotional distress, seeking $300,000. Their IVF journey soured due to suspicions of cheating and missing money. Vanessa claims shared IVF funds; Maddy discovered an affair with Tyler, a mutual friend.
Video.title: Conception, Deception
